title: thouinia striata var. portoricensis
intro: Thouinia striata var. portoricensis, also known as the Puerto Rican thouinia, is a plant species belonging to the family Sapindaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Thouinia striata var. portoricensis include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, due to its antiseptic and antifungal properties. Traditional herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are used to treat various health issues.
